panels.description: Total tokens saved by using Ploston workflows instead of raw MCP tool calls

targets.rawSql: SELECT toUInt64((sum(CASE WHEN tc.source NOT IN ('direct','wrapper') THEN tc.response_bytes ELSE 0 END) - sum(CASE WHEN tc.source IN ('direct','wrapper') THEN tc.response_bytes ELSE 0 END)) / 4) AS value FROM ploston.tool_calls tc JOIN ploston.executions e ON tc.execution_id = e.execution_id WHERE e.workflow_id != '' AND match(e.workflow_id, '${workflow:regex}') AND $__timeFilter(tc.started_at)

panels.title: Tokens Saved

panels.description: Estimated cost savings in USD (claude-sonnet pricing: $7.80/M tokens avg)

targets.rawSql: SELECT round(toUInt64((sum(CASE WHEN tc.source NOT IN ('direct','wrapper') THEN tc.response_bytes ELSE 0 END) - sum(CASE WHEN tc.source IN ('direct','wrapper') THEN tc.response_bytes ELSE 0 END)) / 4) * 7.80 / 1000000, 2) AS value FROM ploston.tool_calls tc JOIN ploston.executions e ON tc.execution_id = e.execution_id WHERE e.workflow_id != '' AND match(e.workflow_id, '${workflow:regex}') AND $__timeFilter(tc.started_at)

panels.title: Cost Saved

panels.description: Percentage of tokens saved compared to raw MCP execution

targets.rawSql: SELECT if(raw_mcp > 0, round((1 - ploston / raw_mcp) * 100, 1), 0) AS value FROM (SELECT sum(CASE WHEN tc.source NOT IN ('direct','wrapper') THEN tc.response_bytes ELSE 0 END) AS raw_mcp, sum(CASE WHEN tc.source IN ('direct','wrapper') THEN tc.response_bytes ELSE 0 END) AS ploston FROM ploston.tool_calls tc JOIN ploston.executions e ON tc.execution_id = e.execution_id WHERE e.workflow_id != '' AND match(e.workflow_id, '${workflow:regex}') AND $__timeFilter(tc.started_at))

panels.title: Token Savings Rate

panels.description: Cost savings over time grouped by workflow

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeInterval(tc.started_at) AS time, e.workflow_id, round(toUInt64((sum(CASE WHEN tc.source NOT IN ('direct','wrapper') THEN tc.response_bytes ELSE 0 END) - sum(CASE WHEN tc.source IN ('direct','wrapper') THEN tc.response_bytes ELSE 0 END)) / 4) * 7.80 / 1000000, 4) AS value FROM ploston.tool_calls tc JOIN ploston.executions e ON tc.execution_id = e.execution_id WHERE e.workflow_id != '' AND match(e.workflow_id, '${workflow:regex}') AND $__timeFilter(tc.started_at) GROUP BY time, e.workflow_id ORDER BY time

panels.title: Cost Savings Over Time

panels.description: Per-workflow breakdown: runs, tokens saved, savings rate, and estimated cost saved

targets.rawSql: SELECT e.workflow_id, count(DISTINCT tc.execution_id) AS runs, toUInt64((sum(CASE WHEN tc.source NOT IN ('direct','wrapper') THEN tc.response_bytes ELSE 0 END) - sum(CASE WHEN tc.source IN ('direct','wrapper') THEN tc.response_bytes ELSE 0 END)) / 4) AS tokens_saved, if(sum(CASE WHEN tc.source NOT IN ('direct','wrapper') THEN tc.response_bytes ELSE 0 END) > 0, round((1 - sum(CASE WHEN tc.source IN ('direct','wrapper') THEN tc.response_bytes ELSE 0 END) / sum(CASE WHEN tc.source NOT IN ('direct','wrapper') THEN tc.response_bytes ELSE 0 END)) * 100, 1), 0) AS savings_pct, round(toUInt64((sum(CASE WHEN tc.source NOT IN ('direct','wrapper') THEN tc.response_bytes ELSE 0 END) - sum(CASE WHEN tc.source IN ('direct','wrapper') THEN tc.response_bytes ELSE 0 END)) / 4) * 7.80 / 1000000, 4) AS cost_saved_usd FROM ploston.tool_calls tc JOIN ploston.executions e ON tc.execution_id = e.execution_id WHERE e.workflow_id != '' AND match(e.workflow_id, '${workflow:regex}') AND $__timeFilter(tc.started_at) GROUP BY e.workflow_id ORDER BY tokens_saved DESC

panels.title: Savings by Workflow

panels.description: Distribution of tokens saved per workflow execution

targets.rawSql: SELECT e.workflow_id, toUInt64((sum(CASE WHEN tc.source NOT IN ('direct','wrapper') THEN tc.response_bytes ELSE 0 END) - sum(CASE WHEN tc.source IN ('direct','wrapper') THEN tc.response_bytes ELSE 0 END)) / 4) AS tokens_saved FROM ploston.tool_calls tc JOIN ploston.executions e ON tc.execution_id = e.execution_id WHERE e.workflow_id != '' AND match(e.workflow_id, '${workflow:regex}') AND $__timeFilter(tc.started_at) GROUP BY tc.execution_id, e.workflow_id ORDER BY tokens_saved DESC

panels.title: Tokens Saved Distribution

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT workflow_id FROM ploston.executions WHERE workflow_id != '' ORDER BY workflow_id
list.name: workflow
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT workflow_id FROM ploston.executions WHERE workflow_id != '' ORDER BY workflow_id
